200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: Darkness Castle Siege Dec 2025
Event Date: 22/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T182


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge - Castle Siege
Ancestors' Monolith Elder Totem

Once in a while, the unit removes all burning and incineration effects from 2 random allied units. It also removes up to 3 random shields or damage-reducing effects from each of 2 random enemy units, and starts incinerating them for 3 sec. Enemy units being incinerated receive 51575 pure damage every second for 3 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the targets being incinerated receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original targets. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 3 sec.

- Level 20
Once in a while, the unit removes all burning and incineration effects from 3 random allied units. It also removes up to 3 random shields or damage-reducing effects from each of 3 random enemy units, and starts incinerating them for 3 sec. Enemy units being incinerated receive 103150 pure damage every second for 4 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the targets being incinerated receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original targets. Once the Incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 3 sec.

- Level 40
Once in a while, the unit removes all burning and incineration effects from 4 random allied units. It also removes up to 3 random shields or damage-reducing effects from each of 4 random enemy units, and starts incinerating them for 5 sec. Enemy units being incinerated receive 206300 pure damage every second for 4 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the targets being incinerated receive pure damage equal to 70% of the damage received by the original targets. Once the Incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 40% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90
